name: aletheia-os
description: Repo-native falsifiable truth tree for AI-assisted research and engineering. Maintains root objectives, skeleton, hypotheses, evidence, decisions, contracts, risks, orphan incubator, and agent attribution in .aletheia/.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-native falsifiable truth tree for AI-assisted research and engineering.
interface.longDescription: AletheiaOS keeps project truth hierarchical, falsifiable, and evolvable in .aletheia/: root objective, skeleton, hypotheses, evidence, decisions, contracts, risks, orphan incubator, and agent attribution for Codex, Claude Code, and other agents.
defaultPrompt: Orient on truth and show hook-free next actions.
Validate and dry-run checkpoint project truth.
